name: Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi
title: The Compassionate Companion
role: Helper of the captives at the Gates of Damascus
shortDescription: A Companion of the Prophet who encountered the captive caravan in Damascus and tried to ease their suffering.
fullStory: Sahl ibn Sa'd was a prominent companion of the Messenger of Allah (pbuh). While traveling in Damascus, he unexpectedly witnessed the arrival of the Ahl al-Bayt captive caravan at the Gate of Hours. Devastated by the sight, he approached one of the ladies (Lady Sakina) and introduced himself. Lady Sakina asked him to pay the spear-bearers carrying the severed heads to move further ahead, thereby diverting the Syrian crowd's gaze from the women. Sahl paid 400 dinars to fulfill this request.
quoteArabic: أنا سهل بن سعد، رأيت جدك رسول الله (ص). هل لكِ من حاجة؟
quote: I am Sahl ibn Sa'd, I have seen your grandfather, the Messenger of Allah (pbuh). Is there anything you need?
